name: task-ESE-0006
title: Build agile service
description: Replace the scattered automation scripts with a cohesive agile service. Three-layer architecture:
acceptanceCriteria: - Single CLI entry point: `npm run agile -- <command>`
demoDeliverable: Visual demo of the agile service CLI: create a ticket, transition through statuses showing gate enforcement, run a sprint lifecycle. Screenshots captured via terminal.
testingScenarios: - Create a ticket, verify JSON file created with UUID
testingNotes: Unit tests for service and repository layers. Integration tests for the full CLI flow.
stakeholderUnderstanding: We are building an agile service to replace the current scattered sprint scripts. The fundamental need is a gating mechanism that prevents tickets from proceeding through the sprint until transition requirements have been verified. It also serves to automate and document sprint processes, assisting both human and agent contributors.
comments:
Folds in task-ESE-0007 (single source of truth for ticket state). The agile service IS the fix for fragmented state.

**Compaction at 2026-03-26T15:18:14Z**: Context was compacted. Review git log and docs/ for recent work.
